commit_scope: Backfill configured task-card defaults for generated spec tasks so pipeline-created spec work carries measurable goal, files_allowed, done_when, commands, and constraints.

local_validation.summary: Prompt template JSON files parse. Focused flow enforcement suite passed 3 tests; variant-specific A and B checks each passed the spec task-card autofill regression. Focused ruff check passed. Local worktree web/API validation passed after retrying through an npm network timeout.

deploy_validation.summary: Pending merge and public deploy verification.

phase_gate.reason: Local focused validation passes; CI and public deploy proof are pending.

evidence_refs: Live monitor issue derived-low_success_rate reported weak_task_card flags on generated spec tasks.
Focused regression proves TaskType.SPEC tasks with idea_id get score=1.0 and no weak_task_card hygiene flag.
Config variants A and B both carry the same task_card_defaults contract.
Local worktree web validation passed: API endpoints, interface parity, and web pages returned PASS.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Newly generated spec tasks should enter the pipeline with a complete task-card validation score instead of weak_task_card context hygiene flags.
test_flows: Create a spec task with only idea_id context and verify task_card_validation.score is 1.0.
Verify generated spec task context_hygiene flags do not include weak_task_card.
Run local worktree API/web contract and verify curated endpoints, interface parity, and web pages pass.
After deploy, inspect monitor issues and recent tasks for reduced weak_task_card creation.
